sep='\n'

    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
prev=load('governance/state/bem846_verify_real_response_after_retry.json')
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
# Collect workflow and helper script facts to diagnose response writer/provider.
disp=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
mailbox=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml')
disp_text=read(disp)
mailbox_text=read(mailbox)
checks=[]
checks.append({'name':'dispatcher_exists','pass':disp.exists(),'evidence':str(disp)})
checks.append({'name':'dispatcher_uses_claude_action','pass':'anthropics/claude-code-action' in disp_text,'evidence':str(disp)})
checks.append({'name':'dispatcher_commits_claude_to_gpt','pass':'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt' in disp_text,'evidence':str(disp)})
checks.append({'name':'dispatcher_records_runtime','pass':'record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py' in disp_text,'evidence':str(disp)})
checks.append({'name':'runtime_state_has_outcome','pass':bool(runtime.get('claude_action_outcome')),'evidence':str(runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'))})
if status_in=='real_claude_response_present':
    status='process_protocol_next'
    next_action='create agreed protocol from real Claude response'
else:
    # Determine exact missing part by repository state.
    if not disp.exists():
        status='dispatcher_workflow_missing'
        next_action='restore Claude dispatcher workflow'
    elif not checks[1]['pass']:
        status='dispatcher_no_claude_action'
        next_action='patch dispatcher to call Claude action'
    elif not checks[2]['pass']:
        status='dispatcher_not_committing_response_path'
        next_action='patch dispatcher commit step to include claude_to_gpt path'
    elif not checks[3]['pass']:
        status='dispatcher_not_recording_runtime'
        next_action='patch runtime state writer into dispatcher'
    elif runtime.get('claude_action_outcome') and runtime.get('claude_action_outcome')!='success':
        status='claude_action_failed'
        next_action='patch provider/auth/action config based on outcome '+str(runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'))
    else:
        status='claude_action_no_response_written'
        next_action='patch prompt/writer contract: force response file path and create post-run validation failure if absent'
state={'bem':'BEM-847','status':status,'bem846_status':status_in,'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'claude_outcome':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'),'checks':checks,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem847_execute_after_bem846.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem847_execute_after_bem846.md').write_text('# BEM-847 | Execute After BEM-846 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-847'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem847_execute_after_bem846.json','governance/reports/bem847_execute_after_bem846.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
